untranslatable_reason: Precise double-bottom detection with 18-day separation and 29% inter-bottom rise requires historical swing point analysis and time-based logic not natively available in the indicator set. The pattern requires identifying two distinct local minima 18±days apart with exact price relationship (29% rise between them), which requires custom bar-by-bar low tracking across the lookback period. Current indicators can approximate conditions but cannot definitively confirm the double-bottom geometry.
